'''nakuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiba|hiba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiba|hiba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nakuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nækikith|nækikith]] || [[word:nækikij|nækikij]] || [[word:nækikish|nækikish]] || [[word:nækiki|nækiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nakukukuth|nakukukuth]] || [[word:nakukukuj|nakukukuj]] || [[word:nakukukush|nakukukush]] || [[word:nakukuku|nakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nakukuth|nakukuth]] || [[word:nakukuj|nakukuj]] || [[word:nakukush|nakukush]] || [[word:nakuku|nakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nakufkuth|nakufkuth]] || [[word:nakufkuj|nakufkuj]] || [[word:nakufkush|nakufkush]] || [[word:nakufkuf|nakufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nakukuthu|nakukuthu]] || [[word:nakukuju|nakukuju]] || [[word:nakukushu|nakukushu]] || [[word:nakukuku|nakukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nakukuth|nakukuth]] || [[word:nakukuj|nakukuj]] || [[word:nakukush|nakukush]] || [[word:nakuku|nakuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nakukuthul|nakukuthul]] || [[word:nakukujul|nakukujul]] || [[word:nakukushul|nakukushul]] || [[word:nakukukul|nakukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nakukuthuthu|nakukuthuthu]] || [[word:nakukujuju|nakukujuju]] || [[word:nakukushushu|nakukushushu]] || [[word:nakukuku|nakukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nakukuthun|nakukuthun]] || [[word:nakukujun|nakukujun]] || [[word:nakukushun|nakukushun]] || [[word:nakukukun|nakukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nakukuthuoro|nakukuthuoro]] || [[word:nakukujuoro|nakukujuoro]] || [[word:nakukushuoro|nakukushuoro]] || [[word:nakukukuoro|nakukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
